drivers.notes: Main + SDA-PRO outboard tweeter for stereo-dimensional imaging

description.en: Reference flagship of the Legend line, using SDA-PRO (Stereo Dimensional Array) topology — main tweeter + Turbine midrange pair on the front baffle plus an outboard pair on the outer edge that cancels interaural acoustic crosstalk for three-dimensional imaging. Twin 10" polypropylene woofers in a Power-Port-vented section; sold as a handed L/R pair.
description.es: Insignia tope de gama de la línea Legend, con topología SDA-PRO (Stereo Dimensional Array) — par principal de tweeter + midrange Turbine al frente más un par exterior que cancela el crosstalk acústico interaural para una imagen tridimensional. Dos woofers de polipropileno de 10" en sección Power Port vented; se vende como par L/R handed.
